examples: Nor is lipoprotein lipase the only molecule affected by muscular inactivity.
The direct effect of ethylene on lipase activity and its mechanism have been studied.
The objective of this research is to examine the temperature effect on lipase activity.
And lipase is important for taking fat and putting it in a form that can be absorbed.
So if lipase is inactivated then the fat can't be absorbed and it passes right through us.
